title: anthoxanthum odoratum f. tenerum
intro: Anthoxanthum odoratum f. tenerum, also known as sweet vernal grass, is a type of flowering grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, sweet vernal grass has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as respiratory problems, skin conditions, and wounds. The health benefits of sweet vernal grass include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as treating allergies and asthma due to its immunomodulatory effects. Sweet vernal grass can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
